q: 2001年の売上合計金額はいくらですか
sql:
SELECT 
  SUM(s."AMOUNT_SOLD") AS "total_sales"
FROM 
  "SH"."SALES" s
  JOIN "SH"."TIMES" t ON s."TIME_ID" = t."TIME_ID"
WHERE 
  t."CALENDAR_YEAR" = 2001

q: 販売チャネルごとの売上合計を教えてください
sql:
SELECT 
  "CH"."CHANNEL_DESC" AS "CHANNEL",
  SUM("S"."AMOUNT_SOLD") AS "TOTAL_SALES"
FROM 
  "SH"."SALES" "S"
  JOIN "SH"."CHANNELS" "CH" ON "S"."CHANNEL_ID" = "CH"."CHANNEL_ID"
GROUP BY 
  "CH"."CHANNEL_DESC"

q: 売上金額が最も多い商品カテゴリの上位3件は何ですか
sql:
SELECT 
  p."PROD_CATEGORY" AS "商品カテゴリ",
  SUM(s."AMOUNT_SOLD") AS "売上金額"
FROM 
  "SH"."SALES" s
  JOIN "SH"."PRODUCTS" p ON s."PROD_ID" = p."PROD_ID"
GROUP BY 
  p."PROD_CATEGORY"
ORDER BY 
  SUM(s."AMOUNT_SOLD") DESC
FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY

q: 顧客数が多い国の上位5件を教えてください
sql:
SELECT 
  c."COUNTRY_NAME" AS country_name, 
  COUNT(DISTINCT cu."CUST_ID") AS customer_count
FROM 
  "SH"."COUNTRIES" c
  JOIN "SH"."CUSTOMERS" cu ON c."COUNTRY_ID" = cu."COUNTRY_ID"
GROUP BY 
  c."COUNTRY_NAME"
ORDER BY 
  customer_count DESC
FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

q: 1999年に売上金額が最も大きかった商品トップ5は
sql:
SELECT 
  p."PROD_NAME" AS product_name, 
  SUM(s."AMOUNT_SOLD") AS total_sales
FROM 
  "SH"."SALES" s
  JOIN "SH"."PRODUCTS" p ON s."PROD_ID" = p."PROD_ID"
  JOIN "SH"."TIMES" t ON s."TIME_ID" = t."TIME_ID"
WHERE 
  t."CALENDAR_YEAR" = 1999
GROUP BY 
  p."PROD_NAME"
ORDER BY 
  total_sales DESC
FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

rows: Mini DV Camcorder with 3.5" Swivel LCD

q: 2001年の月別売上推移を見せてください
sql:
SELECT 
  "T2"."CALENDAR_MONTH_NAME" AS "月",
  SUM("T1"."AMOUNT_SOLD") AS "売上"
FROM 
  "SH"."SALES" "T1"
  JOIN "SH"."TIMES" "T2" ON "T1"."TIME_ID" = "T2"."TIME_ID"
WHERE 
  "T2"."CALENDAR_YEAR" = 2001
GROUP BY 
  "T2"."CALENDAR_MONTH_NAME", "T2"."CALENDAR_MONTH_NUMBER"
ORDER BY 
  "T2"."CALENDAR_MONTH_NUMBER"

q: プロモーション別の売上合計の上位5件は
sql:
SELECT 
  p."PROMO_NAME" AS "PROMO_NAME",
  SUM(s."AMOUNT_SOLD") AS "TOTAL_SALES"
FROM 
  "SH"."PROMOTIONS" p,
  "SH"."SALES" s
WHERE 
  p."PROMO_ID" = s."PROMO_ID"
GROUP BY 
  p."PROMO_NAME"
ORDER BY 
  "TOTAL_SALES" DESC
FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

q: 平均販売単価が最も高い商品はどれですか
sql:
SELECT 
  p."PROD_NAME" AS product_name, 
  AVG(s."AMOUNT_SOLD" / s."QUANTITY_SOLD") AS average_sale_price
FROM 
  "SH"."SALES" s
  JOIN "SH"."PRODUCTS" p ON s."PROD_ID" = p."PROD_ID"
GROUP BY 
  p."PROD_NAME"
ORDER BY 
  average_sale_price DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

q: 2001年で売上が最大だった四半期はいつですか
sql:
SELECT 
  "T2"."FISCAL_QUARTER_DESC" AS "quarter"
FROM 
  "SH"."SALES" "T1"
  JOIN "SH"."TIMES" "T2" ON "T1"."TIME_ID" = "T2"."TIME_ID"
WHERE 
  "T2"."CALENDAR_YEAR" = 2001
GROUP BY 
  "T2"."FISCAL_QUARTER_DESC"
ORDER BY 
  SUM("T1"."AMOUNT_SOLD") DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROW ONLY

q: インターネットチャネルでの2000年の売上合計はいくらですか
sql:
SELECT 
  SUM(s."AMOUNT_SOLD") AS "total_sales"
FROM 
  "SH"."SALES" s
  JOIN "SH"."CHANNELS" c ON s."CHANNEL_ID" = c."CHANNEL_ID"
  JOIN "SH"."TIMES" t ON s."TIME_ID" = t."TIME_ID"
WHERE 
  c."CHANNEL_DESC" = 'internet'
  AND t."CALENDAR_YEAR" = 2000
